# Facebook Post — NVIDIA Launches NemoClaw Enterprise AI Agent Platform at GTC 2026, Bets Big on Inference Revenue
# Week: Week of 2026-03-16
# Brand Voice: GYanTech AI — Visionary, executive audience, lead generation
# Status: Review before posting
# Auto-generated: 2026-03-23T00:02:38.551Z

---

The enterprise AI agent platform just arrived — and it is open source at its core.

At GTC 2026, NVIDIA launched NemoClaw, an enterprise-grade platform for building and running AI agents on a company's own hardware. It is built on OpenClaw, the open-source agent framework that has become one of the fastest-growing projects in the AI development community.

This matters because the two biggest reasons enterprises have hesitated on agentic AI — data governance and infrastructure control — are directly addressed. NemoClaw keeps data on-premises while providing the tooling needed for production-grade autonomous workflows.

NVIDIA also made clear that inference is where it sees the next major revenue opportunity. As AI agents move from prototypes to production, the compute required to run them in real time will scale dramatically. IBM announced an expanded collaboration at GTC focused on sovereign AI with regional data residency — adding a compliance layer for regulated industries.

For executive teams, this collapses the timeline on agentic AI readiness. The platform exists. The governance tooling is being built. The question now is organizational — how quickly can your teams design, pilot, and scale agent-driven workflows?

GYanTech AI works with leadership teams to architect and deploy enterprise agentic AI systems. Start the conversation at www.gyantechai.com

## Fact-check notes
- NVIDIA CEO Jensen Huang announced NemoClaw, an enterprise-grade AI agent platform built on the open-source OpenClaw framework, during the GTC 2026 keynote (Source: TechCrunch, March 16, 2026)
- NemoClaw enables enterprises to build and run AI agents locally on their own hardware (Source: TechCrunch, March 16, 2026)
- NVIDIA highlighted AI inference as a major chip revenue opportunity at GTC 2026 (Source: Reuters, March 16, 2026)
- NVIDIA GTC 2026 revealed the Vera Rubin architecture along with updated AI software platforms (Source: SaasNik / NVIDIA GTC, March 16, 2026)
- IBM announced expanded collaboration with NVIDIA at GTC 2026 to advance enterprise AI, including sovereign AI infrastructure with regional data residency (Source: IBM Newsroom, March 16, 2026)
